description: State document, a decree from the chancery of al-Ḥāfiẓ. Probably a copy of a decree, than an original decree as it is less elegant and less grandiose. Contains some administrative notes on verso like: sijill muʿazzam, al-ʿalāma al-sharīfa, al-ʿalāma al-juyūshiya. Merits further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
